# Project Team — local-semantic-router

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technologies |
|-------|-------------|
| Language | TypeScript 5.7+, Node.js ESM (>=20) |
| Build | tsup, tsx (dev) |
| Testing | Vitest 3 |
| Runtime Deps | yaml, dotenv |
| Patterns | OpenAI-compatible HTTP proxy, SSE streaming, strategy pattern, fallback chain retry |
| Integrations | Anthropic Messages API, OpenAI Completions API, Groq, OpenClaw provider plugin |
| Security | Localhost-only binding, env-var interpolation, 0600 config permissions, YAML schema validation |

## Recommended Subagents

### Implementation

| Subagent | Why |
|----------|-----|
| typescript-pro | Core language — advanced types, ESM module patterns, strict mode |
| javascript-pro | Node.js HTTP server, SSE streaming, fetch API, Buffer handling |
| backend-developer | Proxy server architecture, request routing, fallback chains |
| api-designer | OpenAI-compatible API surface, Anthropic format translation |
| cli-developer | CLI entry point, setup wizard, argument parsing |
| ai-engineer | LLM routing logic, prompt classification, tier scoring engine |
| mcp-developer | OpenClaw plugin integration, MCP server patterns |

### Quality & Review

| Subagent | Why |
|----------|-----|
| test-automator | Vitest test suites, unit + integration coverage |
| code-reviewer | Code quality, pattern consistency across router modules |
| security-auditor | SEC-1 through SEC-8 requirements, API key handling, YAML injection prevention |
| debugger | Proxy debugging, SSE stream issues, provider error diagnosis |
| performance-engineer | Proxy latency, scoring engine performance (<1ms target) |

### Architecture & Planning

| Subagent | Why |
|----------|-----|
| llm-architect | Multi-model routing strategy, classifier design, tier optimization |
| api-designer | Provider abstraction, format translation layer design |
| architect-reviewer | Overall system design, plugin architecture decisions |

## Available Skills

| Skill | When to Use |
|-------|------------|
| `bmad-story-pipeline` | End-to-end story delivery (create, validate, implement, review) |
| `bmad-epic-pipeline` | Full epic delivery across multiple stories in isolated worktrees |
| `bmad-bmm-quick-spec` | Quick tech spec for small features or fixes |
| `bmad-bmm-quick-dev-new-preview` | Implement directly from intent in a single workflow |
| `bmad-bmm-code-review` | Adversarial code review with parallel review layers |
| `bmad-review-edge-case-hunter` | Boundary condition analysis for proxy/routing logic |

## Usage Notes

- Backend/proxy stories: prefer `typescript-pro` or `backend-developer`
- API format translation: prefer `api-designer` or `typescript-pro`
- CLI work: use `cli-developer`
- Routing/classification logic: use `ai-engineer` or `llm-architect`
- Security validation: use `security-auditor`
- Code review & testing: use `code-reviewer` or `test-automator`
- OpenClaw plugin work: use `mcp-developer` or `architect-reviewer`
